name: ASUS PRIME B760M-PLUS Intel B760 (LGA 1700) micro-ATX motherboard  PCIe 4.0, DDR5, two M.2 slots, Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet, SATA 6 Gbps, rear USB 10Gbps, USB 5Gbps Type-C, Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS PRIME B760M-PLUS Intel B760 (LGA 1700) micro-ATX motherboard
description: ASUS PRIME B760M-PLUS is a micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5, PCIe 4.0, and dual M.2 slots.
